2*sum(cr_refunded_cash+cr_reversed_charge+cr_store_credit) ),  cross_sales as (   select i_product_name product_name,          i_item_sk item_sk,          s_store_name store_name,          s_zip store_zip,          ad1.ca_street_number b_street_number,          ad1.ca_street_name b_street_name,          ad1.ca_city b_city,          ad1.ca_zip b_zip,          ad2.ca_street_number c_street_number,          ad2.ca_street_name c_street_name,          ad2.ca_city c_city,          ad2.ca_zip c_zip,          d1.d_year as syear,          d2.d_year as fsyear,          d3.d_year s2year,          count(*) cnt,          sum(ss_wholesale_cost) s1,          sum(ss_list_price) s2,          sum(ss_coupon_amt) s3   FROM store_sales        JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk        JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk AND i_current_price between 17 and 27        JOIN store_returns ON ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number        JOIN cs_ui ON ss_item_sk = cs_ui.cs_item_sk        JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk        JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk        JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON ss_cdemo_sk = cd1.cd_demo_sk              AND cd1.cd_marital_status in ('D', 'U', 'S')             AND cd1.cd_education_status in ('College', 'Advanced Degree')        JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd2.cd_demo_sk             AND cd2.cd_marital_status in ('D', 'U', 'S')             AND cd2.cd_education_status in ('College', 'Advanced Degree')             AND cd1.cd_marital_status <> cd2.cd_marital_status        JOIN household_demographics hd1 ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd1.hd_demo_sk        JOIN household_demographics hd2 ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd2.hd_demo_sk        JOIN income_band ib1 ON hd1.hd_income_band_sk = ib1.ib_income_band_sk        JOIN income_band ib2 ON hd2.hd_income_band_sk = ib2.ib_income_band_sk        JOIN customer_address ad1 ON ss_addr_sk = ad1.ca_address_sk        JOIN customer_address ad2 ON c_current_addr_sk = ad2.ca_address_sk AND ad2.ca_state in ('KS','MN','NV')        JOIN date_dim d2 ON c_first_sales_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk        JOIN date_dim d3 ON c_first_shipto_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk        JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk              AND p_channel_email = 'Y'             AND p_channel_tv = 'N'             AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'   WHERE ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100   group by i_product_name,            i_item_sk,            s_store_name,            s_zip,            ad1.ca_street_number,            ad1.ca_street_name,            ad1.ca_city,            ad1.ca_zip,            ad2.ca_street_number,            ad2.ca_street_name,            ad2.ca_city,            ad2.ca_zip,            d1.d_year,            d2.d_year,            d3.d_year )  select cs1.product_name,        cs1.store_name,        cs1.store_zip,        cs1.b_street_number,        cs1.b_street_name,        cs1.b_city,        cs1.b_zip,        cs1.c_street_number,        cs1.c_street_name,        cs1.c_city,        cs1.c_zip,        cs1.syear,        cs1.cnt,        cs1.s1 as s11,        cs1.s2 as s21,        cs1.s3 as s31,        cs2.s1 as s12,        cs2.s2 as s22,        cs2.s3 as s32,        cs2.syear,        cs2.cnt  from cross_sales cs1 JOIN cross_sales cs2 ON cs1.item_sk = cs2.item_sk                       AND cs1.store_name = cs2.store_name                       AND cs1.store_zip = cs2.store_zip                       AND cs2.cnt <= cs1.cnt where cs1.syear = 1998   and cs2.syear = 1999 order by cs1.product_name,          cs1.store_name,          cs2.cnt,          cs1.s1,          cs2.s1;

original_query: select  	s_store_name, 	i_item_desc, 	sc.revenue, 	i_current_price, 	i_wholesale_cost, 	i_brand  from store, item,      (select ss_store_sk, avg(revenue) as ave  	from  	    (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk,  		     sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  		from store_sales, date_dim  		where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1215 and 1215+11     and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 22 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01  		group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sa  	group by ss_store_sk) sb,      (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  	from store_sales, date_dim  	where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1215 and 1215+11   and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 22 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01  	group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sc  where sb.ss_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave and        s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 16 and 20        and s_state in ('GA','IL','TX')  order by s_store_name, i_item_desc limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH sales_agg AS (     SELECT ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue     FROM store_sales     JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1215 AND 1226       AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.22 AND 0.32     GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk ) SELECT s_store_name, i_item_desc, sc.revenue, i_current_price, i_wholesale_cost, i_brand FROM store JOIN sales_agg sc ON store.s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk JOIN item ON sc.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk JOIN (     SELECT ss_store_sk, AVG(revenue) AS ave     FROM sales_agg     GROUP BY ss_store_sk ) sb ON sc.ss_store_sk = sb.ss_store_sk WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave   AND item.i_manager_id BETWEEN 16 AND 20   AND store.s_state IN ('GA','IL','TX') ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc LIMIT 100;

original_query: select  	s_store_name, 	i_item_desc, 	sc.revenue, 	i_current_price, 	i_wholesale_cost, 	i_brand  from store, item,      (select ss_store_sk, avg(revenue) as ave  	from  	    (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk,  		     sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  		from store_sales, date_dim  		where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11     and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 68 * 0.01 AND 78 * 0.01  		group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sa  	group by ss_store_sk) sb,      (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  	from store_sales, date_dim  	where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1192 and 1192+11   and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 68 * 0.01 AND 78 * 0.01  	group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sc  where sb.ss_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave and        s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 79 and 83        and s_state in ('IN','NM','VA')  order by s_store_name, i_item_desc limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH store_item_revenue AS (     SELECT          ss_store_sk,          ss_item_sk,          SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue,         AVG(SUM(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_store_sk) AS avg_revenue_per_store     FROM store_sales     JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192 + 11       AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.68 * ss_list_price AND 0.78 * ss_list_price     GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk ) SELECT      s.s_store_name,     i.i_item_desc,     sir.revenue,     i.i_current_price,     i.i_wholesale_cost,     i.i_brand FROM store_item_revenue sir JOIN store s ON sir.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk JOIN item i ON sir.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk WHERE sir.revenue <= 0.1 * sir.avg_revenue_per_store   AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 79 AND 83   AND s.s_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA') ORDER BY s.s_store_name, i.i_item_desc LIMIT 100;

original_query: select  	s_store_name, 	i_item_desc, 	sc.revenue, 	i_current_price, 	i_wholesale_cost, 	i_brand  from store, item,      (select ss_store_sk, avg(revenue) as ave  	from  	    (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk,  		     sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  		from store_sales, date_dim  		where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1178 and 1178+11     and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 45 * 0.01 AND 55 * 0.01  		group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sa  	group by ss_store_sk) sb,      (select  ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, sum(ss_sales_price) as revenue  	from store_sales, date_dim  	where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_month_seq between 1178 and 1178+11   and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 45 * 0.01 AND 55 * 0.01  	group by ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk) sc  where sb.ss_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave and        s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk and        i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 83 and 87        and s_state in ('IN','MI','WI')  order by s_store_name, i_item_desc limit 100;
rewritten_query: SELECT s_store_name, i_item_desc, sc.revenue, i_current_price, i_wholesale_cost, i_brand FROM store JOIN (     SELECT ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue,            AVG(SUM(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_store_sk) AS avg_revenue     FROM store_sales     JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1178 AND 1189       AND (ss_sales_price / ss_list_price) BETWEEN 0.45 AND 0.55     GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk ) sc ON store.s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk JOIN item ON item.i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sc.avg_revenue   AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 83 AND 87   AND s_state IN ('IN', 'MI', 'WI') ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc LIMIT 100;

original_query: select    cd_gender,   cd_marital_status,   cd_education_status,   count(*) cnt1,   cd_purchase_estimate,   count(*) cnt2,   cd_credit_rating,   count(*) cnt3  from   customer c,customer_address ca,customer_demographics  where   c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk and   ca_state in ('IN','NM','VA') and   cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk   and cd_marital_status in ('W', 'S', 'M')   and cd_education_status in ('Secondary', 'Primary') and   exists (select *           from store_sales,date_dim           where c.c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk and                 ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                 d_year = 2000 and                 d_moy between 9 and 9+2                 and ss_list_price between 5 and 94           ) and    (not exists (select *             from web_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk and                   ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2000 and                   d_moy between 9 and 9+2                   and ws_list_price between 5 and 94             ) and     not exists (select *             from catalog_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk and                   cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2000 and                   d_moy between 9 and 9+2                   and cs_list_price between 5 and 94)             )  group by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  order by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH date_range AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 2000       AND d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 11 ), store_customers AS (     SELECT DISTINCT ss_customer_sk     FROM store_sales     JOIN date_range ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94 ), web_customers AS (     SELECT DISTINCT ws_bill_customer_sk     FROM web_sales     JOIN date_range ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE ws_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94 ), catalog_customers AS (     SELECT DISTINCT cs_ship_customer_sk     FROM catalog_sales     JOIN date_range ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94 ) SELECT      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     COUNT(*) AS cnt1,     cd_purchase_estimate,     COUNT(*) AS cnt2,     cd_credit_rating,     COUNT(*) AS cnt3 FROM customer c JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk JOIN store_customers sc ON c.c_customer_sk = sc.ss_customer_sk LEFT JOIN web_customers wc ON c.c_customer_sk = wc.ws_bill_customer_sk LEFT JOIN catalog_customers cc ON c.c_customer_sk = cc.cs_ship_customer_sk WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')   AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S', 'M')   AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', 'Primary')   AND wc.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NULL   AND cc.cs_ship_customer_sk IS NULL GROUP BY      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     cd_purchase_estimate,     cd_credit_rating ORDER BY      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     cd_purchase_estimate,     cd_credit_rating LIMIT 100;

original_query: select    cd_gender,   cd_marital_status,   cd_education_status,   count(*) cnt1,   cd_purchase_estimate,   count(*) cnt2,   cd_credit_rating,   count(*) cnt3  from   customer c,customer_address ca,customer_demographics  where   c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk and   ca_state in ('MS','NM','TN') and   cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk   and cd_marital_status in ('W', 'S', 'W')   and cd_education_status in ('College', 'Advanced Degree') and   exists (select *           from store_sales,date_dim           where c.c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk and                 ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                 d_year = 1999 and                 d_moy between 2 and 2+2                 and ss_list_price between 211 and 300           ) and    (not exists (select *             from web_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk and                   ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 1999 and                   d_moy between 2 and 2+2                   and ws_list_price between 211 and 300             ) and     not exists (select *             from catalog_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk and                   cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 1999 and                   d_moy between 2 and 2+2                   and cs_list_price between 211 and 300)             )  group by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  order by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH date_range AS (   SELECT d_date_sk   FROM date_dim   WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy BETWEEN 2 AND 4 ) SELECT      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     COUNT(*) AS cnt1,     cd_purchase_estimate,     COUNT(*) AS cnt2,     cd_credit_rating,     COUNT(*) AS cnt3 FROM customer c JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk WHERE      ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NM', 'TN')     AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S')     AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Advanced Degree')     AND EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM store_sales ss         JOIN date_range dr ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk         WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk           AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300     )     AND NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM web_sales ws         JOIN date_range dr ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk         WHERE ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk           AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300     )     AND NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM catalog_sales cs         JOIN date_range dr ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk         WHERE cs.cs_ship_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk           AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300     ) GROUP BY      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     cd_purchase_estimate,     cd_credit_rating ORDER BY      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     cd_purchase_estimate,     cd_credit_rating LIMIT 100;

original_query: select    cd_gender,   cd_marital_status,   cd_education_status,   count(*) cnt1,   cd_purchase_estimate,   count(*) cnt2,   cd_credit_rating,   count(*) cnt3  from   customer c,customer_address ca,customer_demographics  where   c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk and   ca_state in ('MD','MO','OK') and   cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk   and cd_marital_status in ('W', 'U', 'W')   and cd_education_status in ('Primary', 'Primary') and   exists (select *           from store_sales,date_dim           where c.c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk and                 ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                 d_year = 2002 and                 d_moy between 5 and 5+2                 and ss_list_price between 132 and 221           ) and    (not exists (select *             from web_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk and                   ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2002 and                   d_moy between 5 and 5+2                   and ws_list_price between 132 and 221             ) and     not exists (select *             from catalog_sales,date_dim             where c.c_customer_sk = cs_ship_customer_sk and                   cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk and                   d_year = 2002 and                   d_moy between 5 and 5+2                   and cs_list_price between 132 and 221)             )  group by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  order by cd_gender,           cd_marital_status,           cd_education_status,           cd_purchase_estimate,           cd_credit_rating  limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH date_range AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 2002       AND d_moy BETWEEN 5 AND 7 ), eligible_customers AS (     SELECT DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk     FROM customer c     JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk     JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk     JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk     JOIN date_range ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk     WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('MD', 'MO', 'OK')       AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'U')       AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Primary'       AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 132 AND 221       AND NOT EXISTS (           SELECT 1           FROM web_sales ws           JOIN date_range ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk           WHERE c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk             AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 132 AND 221           UNION ALL           SELECT 1           FROM catalog_sales cs           JOIN date_range ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk           WHERE c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_ship_customer_sk             AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 132 AND 221       ) ) SELECT cd_gender,        cd_marital_status,        cd_education_status,        COUNT(*) AS cnt1,        cd_purchase_estimate,        COUNT(*) AS cnt2,        cd_credit_rating,        COUNT(*) AS cnt3 FROM customer c JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('MD', 'MO', 'OK')   AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'U')   AND cd.cd_education_status = 'Primary'   AND c.c_customer_sk IN (SELECT c_customer_sk FROM eligible_customers) GROUP BY cd_gender,          cd_marital_status,          cd_education_status,          cd_purchase_estimate,          cd_credit_rating ORDER BY cd_gender,          cd_marital_status,          cd_education_status,          cd_purchase_estimate,          cd_credit_rating LIMIT 100;

original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'U'   and cd_dep_count between 5 and 7   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH date_dim_2001 AS (     SELECT *      FROM date_dim      WHERE d_year = 2001 ) SELECT      i_item_desc,     w_warehouse_name,     d1.d_week_seq,     COUNT(*) - COUNT(p_promo_sk) AS no_promo,     COUNT(p_promo_sk) AS promo,     COUNT(*) AS total_cnt FROM catalog_sales JOIN item ON (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) JOIN customer_demographics ON (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) JOIN household_demographics ON (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) JOIN date_dim_2001 d1 ON (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) JOIN inventory ON (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) JOIN warehouse ON (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk) JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq) JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days') LEFT JOIN promotion ON (cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk) WHERE      inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity     AND hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'     AND cd_marital_status = 'U'     AND cd_dep_count BETWEEN 5 AND 7     AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')     AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100 GROUP BY i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq ORDER BY total_cnt DESC, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq LIMIT 100;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_sales AS (     SELECT cs_item_sk, cs_bill_cdemo_sk, cs_bill_hdemo_sk, cs_sold_date_sk,             cs_ship_date_sk, cs_promo_sk, cs_quantity, cs_order_number     FROM catalog_sales     WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 17 AND 37 ), filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_week_seq     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 2001 ), filtered_items AS (     SELECT i_item_sk, i_item_desc, i_category     FROM item     WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports') ) SELECT i_item_desc,        w_warehouse_name,        d1.d_week_seq,        SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) no_promo,        SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) promo,        COUNT(*) total_cnt FROM filtered_sales cs JOIN filtered_items i ON (i.i_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk) JOIN inventory inv ON (cs.cs_item_sk = inv.inv_item_sk) JOIN warehouse w ON (w.w_warehouse_sk = inv.inv_warehouse_sk) JOIN customer_demographics cd ON (cs.cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk) JOIN household_demographics hd ON (cs.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk) JOIN filtered_dates d1 ON (cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) JOIN date_dim d2 ON (inv.inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs.cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) LEFT OUTER JOIN promotion p ON (cs.cs_promo_sk = p.p_promo_sk) WHERE d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   AND inv.inv_quantity_on_hand < cs.cs_quantity   AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 day'   AND hd.hd_buy_potential = '>10000'   AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'   AND cd.cd_dep_count BETWEEN 4 AND 6 GROUP BY i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq ORDER BY total_cnt DESC, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq LIMIT 100;

original_query: WITH all_sales AS (  SELECT d_year        ,i_brand_id        ,i_class_id        ,i_category_id        ,i_manufact_id        ,SUM(sales_cnt) AS sales_cnt        ,SUM(sales_amt) AS sales_amt  FROM (SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,cs_quantity - COALESCE(cr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,cs_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(cr_return_amount,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM catalog_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=cs_item_sk                           JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=cs_sold_date_sk                           LEFT JOIN catalog_returns ON (cs_order_number=cr_order_number                                                     AND cs_item_sk=cr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and cs_sales_price / cs_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01        and cr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)        UNION        SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,ss_quantity - COALESCE(sr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ss_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(sr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM store_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ss_item_sk                         JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ss_sold_date_sk                         LEFT JOIN store_returns ON (ss_ticket_number=sr_ticket_number                                                 AND ss_item_sk=sr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01        and sr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)        UNION        SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,ws_quantity - COALESCE(wr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ws_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(wr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM web_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ws_item_sk                       JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ws_sold_date_sk                       LEFT JOIN web_returns ON (ws_order_number=wr_order_number                                             AND ws_item_sk=wr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Sports'        and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01        and wr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)) sales_detail GROUP BY d_year, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id, i_manufact_id)  SELECT  prev_yr.d_year AS prev_year                           ,curr_yr.d_year AS year                           ,curr_yr.i_brand_id                           ,curr_yr.i_class_id                           ,curr_yr.i_category_id                           ,curr_yr.i_manufact_id                           ,prev_yr.sales_cnt AS prev_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt AS curr_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt-prev_yr.sales_cnt AS sales_cnt_diff                           ,curr_yr.sales_amt-prev_yr.sales_amt AS sales_amt_diff  FROM all_sales curr_yr, all_sales prev_yr  WHERE curr_yr.i_brand_id=prev_yr.i_brand_id    AND curr_yr.i_class_id=prev_yr.i_class_id    AND curr_yr.i_category_id=prev_yr.i_category_id    AND curr_yr.i_manufact_id=prev_yr.i_manufact_id    AND curr_yr.d_year=1999    AND prev_yr.d_year=1999-1    AND prev_yr.sales_cnt > 0    AND CAST(curr_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))/CAST(prev_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))<0.9  ORDER BY sales_cnt_diff,sales_amt_diff  limit 100;

COALESCE(sr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ss_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(sr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM store_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ss_item_sk                         JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ss_sold_date_sk                         LEFT JOIN store_returns ON (ss_ticket_number=sr_ticket_number                                                 AND ss_item_sk=sr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Women'        and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 68 * 0.01 AND 88 * 0.01        and sr_reason_sk in (9, 19, 23, 33, 44)        UNION        SELECT d_year              ,i_brand_id              ,i_class_id              ,i_category_id              ,i_manufact_id              ,ws_quantity - COALESCE(wr_return_quantity,0) AS sales_cnt              ,ws_ext_sales_price - COALESCE(wr_return_amt,0.0) AS sales_amt        FROM web_sales JOIN item ON i_item_sk=ws_item_sk                       JOIN date_dim ON d_date_sk=ws_sold_date_sk                       LEFT JOIN web_returns ON (ws_order_number=wr_order_number                                             AND ws_item_sk=wr_item_sk)        WHERE i_category='Women'        and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 68 * 0.01 AND 88 * 0.01        and wr_reason_sk in (9, 19, 23, 33, 44)) sales_detail GROUP BY d_year, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id, i_manufact_id)  SELECT  prev_yr.d_year AS prev_year                           ,curr_yr.d_year AS year                           ,curr_yr.i_brand_id                           ,curr_yr.i_class_id                           ,curr_yr.i_category_id                           ,curr_yr.i_manufact_id                           ,prev_yr.sales_cnt AS prev_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt AS curr_yr_cnt                           ,curr_yr.sales_cnt-prev_yr.sales_cnt AS sales_cnt_diff                           ,curr_yr.sales_amt-prev_yr.sales_amt AS sales_amt_diff  FROM all_sales curr_yr, all_sales prev_yr  WHERE curr_yr.i_brand_id=prev_yr.i_brand_id    AND curr_yr.i_class_id=prev_yr.i_class_id    AND curr_yr.i_category_id=prev_yr.i_category_id    AND curr_yr.i_manufact_id=prev_yr.i_manufact_id    AND curr_yr.d_year=2002    AND prev_yr.d_year=2002-1    AND prev_yr.sales_cnt > 0    AND CAST(curr_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))/CAST(prev_yr.sales_cnt AS DECIMAL(17,2))<0.9  ORDER BY sales_cnt_diff,sales_amt_diff  limit 100;

original_query: with ssr as  (select  s_store_id as store_id,           sum(ss_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(sr_return_amt, 0)) as total_returns,           sum(ss_net_profit - coalesce(sr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from store_sales left outer join store_returns on          (ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number),      date_dim,      store,      item,      promotion  where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('2001-08-11' as date)                   and cast('2001-08-11' as date) + interval '30' day        and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk        and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60        and i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports')  group by s_store_id)  ,  csr as  (select  cp_catalog_page_id as catalog_page_id,           sum(cs_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(cr_return_amount, 0)) as total_returns,           sum(cs_net_profit - coalesce(cr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from catalog_sales left outer join catalog_returns on          (cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk and cs_order_number = cr_order_number),      date_dim,      catalog_page,      item,      promotion  where cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('2001-08-11' as date)                   and cast('2001-08-11' as date) + interval '30' day         and cs_catalog_page_sk = cp_catalog_page_sk        and cs_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60        and i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports') group by cp_catalog_page_id)  ,  wsr as  (select  web_site_id,           sum(ws_ext_sales_price) as sales,           sum(coalesce(wr_return_amt, 0)) as total_returns,           sum(ws_net_profit - coalesce(wr_net_loss, 0)) as profit   from web_sales left outer join web_returns on          (ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk and ws_order_number = wr_order_number),      date_dim,      web_site,      item,      promotion  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk        and d_date between cast('2001-08-11' as date)                   and cast('2001-08-11' as date) + interval '30' day         and ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk        and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk        and i_current_price > 50        and ws_promo_sk = p_promo_sk        and p_channel_email = 'N'        and p_channel_tv = 'N'        and p_channel_radio = 'Y'        and p_channel_press = 'N'        and p_channel_event = 'Y'        and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60        and i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports') group by web_site_id)   select  channel         , id         , sum(sales) as sales         , sum(total_returns) as total_returns         , sum(profit) as profit  from  (select 'store channel' as channel         , 'store' || store_id as id         , sales         ,total_returns         , profit  from   ssr  union all  select 'catalog channel' as channel         , 'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id as id         , sales         ,total_returns         , profit  from  csr  union all  select 'web channel' as channel         , 'web_site' || web_site_id as id         , sales         ,total_returns         , profit  from   wsr  ) x  group by rollup (channel, id)  order by channel          ,id  limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_promotion AS (     SELECT p_promo_sk     FROM promotion     WHERE p_channel_email = 'N'       AND p_channel_tv = 'N'       AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'       AND p_channel_press = 'N'       AND p_channel_event = 'Y' ),  filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_date BETWEEN CAST('2001-08-11' AS DATE) AND CAST('2001-08-11' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '30' day ),  filtered_items AS (     SELECT i_item_sk     FROM item     WHERE i_current_price > 50       AND i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Sports') ), ssr AS (     SELECT         s_store_id AS store_id,         SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS sales,         SUM(COALESCE(sr_return_amt, 0)) AS total_returns,         SUM(ss_net_profit - COALESCE(sr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit     FROM store_sales     LEFT JOIN store_returns ON ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number     INNER JOIN filtered_dates ON ss_sold_date_sk = filtered_dates.d_date_sk     INNER JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk     INNER JOIN filtered_items ON ss_item_sk = filtered_items.i_item_sk     INNER JOIN filtered_promotion ON ss_promo_sk = filtered_promotion.p_promo_sk     WHERE ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60     GROUP BY s_store_id ), csr AS (     SELECT         cp_catalog_page_id AS catalog_page_id,         SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS sales,         SUM(COALESCE(cr_return_amount, 0)) AS total_returns,         SUM(cs_net_profit - COALESCE(cr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit     FROM catalog_sales     LEFT JOIN catalog_returns ON cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk AND cs_order_number = cr_order_number     INNER JOIN filtered_dates ON cs_sold_date_sk = filtered_dates.d_date_sk     INNER JOIN catalog_page ON cs_catalog_page_sk = cp_catalog_page_sk     INNER JOIN filtered_items ON cs_item_sk = filtered_items.i_item_sk     INNER JOIN filtered_promotion ON cs_promo_sk = filtered_promotion.p_promo_sk     WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60     GROUP BY cp_catalog_page_id ), wsr AS (     SELECT         web_site_id,         SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS sales,         SUM(COALESCE(wr_return_amt, 0)) AS total_returns,         SUM(ws_net_profit - COALESCE(wr_net_loss, 0)) AS profit     FROM web_sales     LEFT JOIN web_returns ON ws_item_sk = wr_item_sk AND ws_order_number = wr_order_number     INNER JOIN filtered_dates ON ws_sold_date_sk = filtered_dates.d_date_sk     INNER JOIN web_site ON ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk     INNER JOIN filtered_items ON ws_item_sk = filtered_items.i_item_sk     INNER JOIN filtered_promotion ON ws_promo_sk = filtered_promotion.p_promo_sk     WHERE ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 60     GROUP BY web_site_id ) SELECT     channel,     id,     SUM(sales) AS sales,     SUM(total_returns) AS total_returns,     SUM(profit) AS profit FROM (     SELECT 'store channel' AS channel,            'store' || store_id AS id,            sales,            total_returns,            profit     FROM ssr     UNION ALL     SELECT 'catalog channel' AS channel,            'catalog_page' || catalog_page_id AS id,            sales,            total_returns,            profit     FROM csr     UNION ALL     SELECT 'web channel' AS channel,            'web_site' || web_site_id AS id,            sales,            total_returns,            profit     FROM wsr ) x GROUP BY ROLLUP (channel, id) ORDER BY channel, id LIMIT 100;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 1998 ), filtered_cd1 AS (     SELECT cd_demo_sk, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status     FROM customer_demographics     WHERE (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree')        OR (cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_education_status = 'College')        OR (cd_marital_status = 'D' AND cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree') ), filtered_address AS (     SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_state     FROM customer_address     WHERE ca_country = 'United States'     AND (ca_state IN ('GA', 'IN', 'VA')        OR ca_state IN ('MT', 'NM', 'OR')       OR ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH')) ) SELECT      MIN(ws_quantity),     MIN(wr_refunded_cash),     MIN(wr_fee),     MIN(ws_item_sk),     MIN(wr_order_number),     MIN(cd1.cd_demo_sk),     MIN(cd2.cd_demo_sk) FROM web_returns wr JOIN filtered_cd1 cd1 ON wr.wr_refunded_cdemo_sk = cd1.cd_demo_sk JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON wr.wr_returning_cdemo_sk = cd2.cd_demo_sk     AND cd2.cd_marital_status = cd1.cd_marital_status     AND cd2.cd_education_status = cd1.cd_education_status JOIN filtered_address ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = wr.wr_refunded_addr_sk JOIN web_sales ws ON ws.ws_item_sk = wr.wr_item_sk      AND ws.ws_order_number = wr.wr_order_number JOIN filtered_dates d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk JOIN web_page wp ON ws.ws_web_page_sk = wp.wp_web_page_sk JOIN reason r ON wr.wr_reason_sk = r.r_reason_sk WHERE ((cd1.cd_marital_status = 'W' AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00)     OR (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'S' AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00)     OR (cd1.cd_marital_status = 'D' AND ws_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00)) AND ((ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IN', 'VA') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)     OR (ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'NM', 'OR') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)     OR (ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH') AND ws_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250));

original_query: select           cc_call_center_id Call_Center,         cc_name Call_Center_Name,         cc_manager Manager,         sum(cr_net_loss) Returns_Loss from         call_center,         catalog_returns,         date_dim,         customer,         customer_address,         customer_demographics,         household_demographics where         cr_call_center_sk       = cc_call_center_sk and     cr_returned_date_sk     = d_date_sk and     cr_returning_customer_sk= c_customer_sk and     cd_demo_sk              = c_current_cdemo_sk and     hd_demo_sk              = c_current_hdemo_sk and     ca_address_sk           = c_current_addr_sk and     d_year                  = 1999  and     d_moy                   = 5 and     ( (cd_marital_status       = 'M' and cd_education_status     = 'Unknown')         or(cd_marital_status       = 'W' and cd_education_status     = 'Advanced Degree')) and     hd_buy_potential like '0-500%' and     ca_gmt_offset           = -7 group by cc_call_center_id,cc_name,cc_manager,cd_marital_status,cd_education_status order by sum(cr_net_loss) desc;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_date AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 5 ), filtered_cd AS (     SELECT cd_demo_sk     FROM customer_demographics     WHERE (cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd_education_status = 'Unknown')        OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree') ), filtered_hd AS (     SELECT hd_demo_sk     FROM household_demographics     WHERE hd_buy_potential LIKE '0-500%' ), filtered_ca AS (     SELECT ca_address_sk     FROM customer_address     WHERE ca_gmt_offset = -7 ) SELECT      MIN(cc_call_center_id),     MIN(cc_name),     MIN(cc_manager),     MIN(cr_net_loss),     MIN(cr_item_sk),     MIN(cr_order_number) FROM catalog_returns JOIN filtered_date ON cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk JOIN call_center ON cr_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk JOIN customer c ON cr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN filtered_cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk JOIN filtered_hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk JOIN filtered_ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_date AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 10 ), filtered_demographics AS (     SELECT cd_demo_sk     FROM customer_demographics     WHERE (cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd_education_status = 'Unknown')        OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree') ), filtered_household AS (     SELECT hd_demo_sk     FROM household_demographics     WHERE hd_buy_potential LIKE 'Unknown%' ), filtered_address AS (     SELECT ca_address_sk     FROM customer_address     WHERE ca_gmt_offset = -7 ), filtered_customers AS (     SELECT c_customer_sk     FROM customer, filtered_demographics, filtered_household, filtered_address     WHERE cd_demo_sk = c_current_cdemo_sk     AND hd_demo_sk = c_current_hdemo_sk     AND ca_address_sk = c_current_addr_sk ) SELECT      MIN(cc_call_center_id),     MIN(cc_name),     MIN(cc_manager),     MIN(cr_net_loss),     MIN(cr_item_sk),     MIN(cr_order_number) FROM call_center JOIN catalog_returns ON cr_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk JOIN filtered_date ON cr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk JOIN filtered_customers ON cr_returning_customer_sk = c_customer_sk;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 3 ), filtered_demographics AS (     SELECT cd_demo_sk     FROM customer_demographics     WHERE (cd_marital_status = 'M' AND cd_education_status = 'Unknown')     OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = 'Advanced Degree') ), filtered_households AS (     SELECT hd_demo_sk     FROM household_demographics     WHERE hd_buy_potential LIKE '>10000%' ), filtered_addresses AS (     SELECT ca_address_sk     FROM customer_address     WHERE ca_gmt_offset = -7 ) SELECT      MIN(cc.cc_call_center_id),     MIN(cc.cc_name),     MIN(cc.cc_manager),     MIN(cr.cr_net_loss),     MIN(cr.cr_item_sk),     MIN(cr.cr_order_number) FROM catalog_returns cr JOIN filtered_dates fd ON cr.cr_returned_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk JOIN customer c ON cr.cr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN filtered_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk JOIN filtered_households hd ON hd.hd_demo_sk = c.c_current_hdemo_sk JOIN filtered_addresses ca ON ca.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk JOIN call_center cc ON cr.cr_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk;

original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as Excess Discount Amount from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 394 and 593 or i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '2002-02-11' and         cast('2002-02-11' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '2002-02-11' and                              cast('2002-02-11' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 85 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH avg_discount AS (     SELECT          ws_item_sk,         1.3 * AVG(ws_ext_discount_amt) AS avg_disc     FROM web_sales     JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     WHERE          d_date BETWEEN '2002-02-11' AND '2002-02-11'::date + INTERVAL '90' DAY         AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88         AND (ws_sales_price / ws_list_price) BETWEEN 0.85 AND 1.00     GROUP BY ws_item_sk ) SELECT      SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS Excess Discount Amount FROM web_sales ws JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk JOIN avg_discount ad ON ws.ws_item_sk = ad.ws_item_sk WHERE      d.d_date BETWEEN '2002-02-11' AND '2002-02-11'::date + INTERVAL '90' DAY     AND (i.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 394 AND 593 OR i.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports'))     AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 68 AND 88     AND ws.ws_ext_discount_amt > ad.avg_disc ORDER BY SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as Excess Discount Amount from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 749 and 948 or i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '2001-01-31' and         cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '2001-01-31' and                              cast('2001-01-31' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 17 * 0.01 AND 32 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH date_range AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_date BETWEEN '2001-01-31' AND CAST('2001-01-31' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '90' DAY ),  avg_discounts AS (     SELECT         ws_item_sk,         AVG(ws_ext_discount_amt) AS avg_disc     FROM         web_sales         JOIN date_range ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_range.d_date_sk     WHERE         web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77         AND (web_sales.ws_sales_price / web_sales.ws_list_price) BETWEEN 0.17 AND 0.32     GROUP BY         ws_item_sk ) SELECT     SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) AS Excess Discount Amount FROM     web_sales ws     JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk     JOIN date_range dr ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk     JOIN avg_discounts ad ON ws.ws_item_sk = ad.ws_item_sk WHERE     (i.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 749 AND 948 OR i.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports'))     AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 57 AND 77     AND ws.ws_ext_discount_amt > 1.3 * ad.avg_disc ORDER BY SUM(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     sum(ws_ext_discount_amt)  as Excess Discount Amount from     web_sales    ,item    ,date_dim where (i_manufact_id BETWEEN 423 and 622 or i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')) and i_item_sk = ws_item_sk and d_date between '1999-03-22' and         cast('1999-03-22' as date) + interval '90' day and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100 and ws_ext_discount_amt      > (          SELECT             1.3 * avg(ws_ext_discount_amt)          FROM             web_sales            ,date_dim          WHERE               ws_item_sk = i_item_sk           and d_date between '1999-03-22' and                              cast('1999-03-22' as date) + interval '90' day           and d_date_sk = ws_sold_date_sk           and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100           and ws_sales_price / ws_list_price BETWEEN 69 * 0.01 AND 84 * 0.01   ) order by sum(ws_ext_discount_amt) limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH date_range AS (     SELECT          '1999-03-22'::date AS start_date,         '1999-03-22'::date + interval '90' day AS end_date ), item_avg AS (     SELECT          ws.ws_item_sk,          1.3 * avg(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) as avg_disc     FROM          web_sales ws         JOIN date_dim d ON d.d_date_sk = ws.ws_sold_date_sk         JOIN item i ON i.i_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk         JOIN date_range dr ON 1=1     WHERE          d.d_date BETWEEN dr.start_date AND dr.end_date         AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100         AND ws.ws_sales_price / ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 0.69 AND 0.84         AND (i.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 423 AND 622 OR i.i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women'))     GROUP BY          ws.ws_item_sk ) SELECT      sum(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) as Excess Discount Amount FROM      web_sales ws     JOIN item i ON i.i_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk     JOIN date_dim d ON d.d_date_sk = ws.ws_sold_date_sk     JOIN item_avg ia ON ws.ws_item_sk = ia.ws_item_sk     JOIN date_range dr ON 1=1 WHERE      (i.i_manufact_id BETWEEN 423 AND 622 OR i.i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women'))     AND d.d_date BETWEEN dr.start_date AND dr.end_date     AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100     AND ws.ws_ext_discount_amt > ia.avg_disc ORDER BY      sum(ws.ws_ext_discount_amt) LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     count(distinct ws_order_number) as order count   ,sum(ws_ext_ship_cost) as total shipping cost   ,sum(ws_net_profit) as total net profit from    web_sales ws1   ,date_dim   ,customer_address   ,web_site where     d_date between '2000-10-01' and            cast('2000-10-01' as date) + interval '60 day' and ws1.ws_ship_date_sk = d_date_sk and ws1.ws_ship_addr_sk = ca_address_sk and ca_state in ('IA','IN','MT'             ,'NE' ,'OK' ,'TX') and ws1.ws_web_site_sk = web_site_sk and web_gmt_offset >= -7 and ws1.ws_list_price between 141 and 170 and exists (select *             from web_sales ws2             where ws1.ws_order_number = ws2.ws_order_number               and ws1.ws_warehouse_sk <> ws2.ws_warehouse_sk) and not exists(select *                from web_returns wr1                where ws1.ws_order_number = wr1.wr_order_number                and wr1.wr_reason_sk in (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)                ) order by count(distinct ws_order_number) limit 100;
rewritten_query: SELECT     COUNT(DISTINCT ws.ws_order_number) AS order count,     SUM(ws.ws_ext_ship_cost) AS total shipping cost,     SUM(ws.ws_net_profit) AS total net profit FROM     web_sales ws     INNER JOIN date_dim dd ON ws.ws_ship_date_sk = dd.d_date_sk     INNER JOIN customer_address ca ON ws.ws_ship_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk     INNER JOIN web_site ws_site ON ws.ws_web_site_sk = ws_site.web_site_sk WHERE     dd.d_date BETWEEN '2000-10-01' AND '2000-11-30'     AND ca.ca_state IN ('IA', 'IN', 'MT', 'NE', 'OK', 'TX')     AND ws_site.web_gmt_offset >= -7     AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 141 AND 170     AND EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM web_sales ws2         WHERE ws.ws_order_number = ws2.ws_order_number           AND ws.ws_warehouse_sk <> ws2.ws_warehouse_sk     )     AND NOT EXISTS (         SELECT 1         FROM web_returns wr         WHERE ws.ws_order_number = wr.wr_order_number           AND wr.wr_reason_sk IN (7, 10, 12, 29, 45)     );

rewritten_query: WITH multi_warehouse_orders AS (     SELECT ws_order_number     FROM web_sales     GROUP BY ws_order_number     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ws_warehouse_sk) > 1 ) SELECT      COUNT(DISTINCT ws1.ws_order_number) AS order count,     SUM(ws1.ws_ext_ship_cost) AS total shipping cost,     SUM(ws1.ws_net_profit) AS total net profit FROM web_sales ws1 INNER JOIN date_dim      ON ws1.ws_ship_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk INNER JOIN customer_address      ON ws1.ws_ship_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk INNER JOIN web_site      ON ws1.ws_web_site_sk = web_site.web_site_sk INNER JOIN multi_warehouse_orders mwo      ON ws1.ws_order_number = mwo.ws_order_number LEFT JOIN web_returns wr1      ON ws1.ws_order_number = wr1.wr_order_number     AND wr1.wr_reason_sk IN (20, 27, 54, 55, 64) WHERE date_dim.d_date BETWEEN '1998-09-01' AND DATE '1998-09-01' + INTERVAL '60 days'   AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('IN','KS','MD','NE','OK','VA')   AND web_site.web_gmt_offset >= -7   AND ws1.ws_list_price BETWEEN 111 AND 140   AND wr1.wr_order_number IS NULL ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 30 ) then 1 else 0 end)  as 30 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 30) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 60) then 1 else 0 end )  as 31-60 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 60) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 90) then 1 else 0 end)  as 61-90 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 90) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as 91-120 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk  > 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as >120 days from    catalog_sales   ,warehouse   ,ship_mode   ,call_center   ,date_dim where d_month_seq between 1193 and 1193 + 23 and cs_ship_date_sk   = d_date_sk and cs_warehouse_sk   = w_warehouse_sk and cs_ship_mode_sk   = sm_ship_mode_sk and cs_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk and cs_list_price between 77 and 106 and sm_type = 'TWO DAY' and cc_class = 'small' and w_gmt_offset = -5 group by    substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name order by substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)         ,sm_type         ,cc_name limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1193 AND 1216 ), filtered_ship_modes AS (     SELECT sm_ship_mode_sk, sm_type     FROM ship_mode     WHERE sm_type = 'TWO DAY' ), filtered_call_centers AS (     SELECT cc_call_center_sk, cc_name     FROM call_center     WHERE cc_class = 'small' ), filtered_warehouses AS (     SELECT w_warehouse_sk, SUBSTRING(w_warehouse_name, 1, 20) AS w_name_short     FROM warehouse     WHERE w_gmt_offset = -5 ) SELECT      w.w_name_short,     sm.sm_type,     cc.cc_name,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 30) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 30 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 30) AND (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 60) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 31-60 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 60) AND (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 90) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 61-90 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 90) AND (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 120) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 91-120 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 120) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS >120 days FROM      catalog_sales cs JOIN filtered_dates fd ON cs.cs_ship_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk JOIN filtered_warehouses w ON cs.cs_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk JOIN filtered_ship_modes sm ON cs.cs_ship_mode_sk = sm.sm_ship_mode_sk JOIN filtered_call_centers cc ON cs.cs_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk WHERE      cs_list_price BETWEEN 77 AND 106 GROUP BY     w.w_name_short,     sm.sm_type,     cc.cc_name ORDER BY     w.w_name_short,     sm.sm_type,     cc.cc_name LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 30 ) then 1 else 0 end)  as 30 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 30) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 60) then 1 else 0 end )  as 31-60 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 60) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 90) then 1 else 0 end)  as 61-90 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 90) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as 91-120 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk  > 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as >120 days from    catalog_sales   ,warehouse   ,ship_mode   ,call_center   ,date_dim where d_month_seq between 1207 and 1207 + 23 and cs_ship_date_sk   = d_date_sk and cs_warehouse_sk   = w_warehouse_sk and cs_ship_mode_sk   = sm_ship_mode_sk and cs_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk and cs_list_price between 114 and 143 and sm_type = 'OVERNIGHT' and cc_class = 'small' and w_gmt_offset = -5 group by    substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name order by substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)         ,sm_type         ,cc_name limit 100;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1207 AND 1230 ), filtered_sales AS (     SELECT          cs_warehouse_sk,         cs_ship_mode_sk,         cs_call_center_sk,         cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk AS days_diff     FROM catalog_sales cs     JOIN filtered_dates fd ON cs.cs_ship_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk     WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 114 AND 143 ) SELECT      SUBSTRING(w_warehouse_name, 1, 20) AS warehouse_short,     sm_type,     cc_name,     SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 30 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff > 30 AND days_diff <= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 31-60 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff > 60 AND days_diff <= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 61-90 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff > 90 AND days_diff <= 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 91-120 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN days_diff > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS >120 days FROM filtered_sales fs JOIN warehouse w ON fs.cs_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk AND w.w_gmt_offset = -5 JOIN ship_mode sm ON fs.cs_ship_mode_sk = sm.sm_ship_mode_sk AND sm.sm_type = 'OVERNIGHT' JOIN call_center cc ON fs.cs_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk AND cc.cc_class = 'small' GROUP BY      warehouse_short,     sm_type,     cc_name ORDER BY      warehouse_short,     sm_type,     cc_name LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 30 ) then 1 else 0 end)  as 30 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 30) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 60) then 1 else 0 end )  as 31-60 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 60) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 90) then 1 else 0 end)  as 61-90 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 90) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as 91-120 days   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk  > 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as >120 days from    catalog_sales   ,warehouse   ,ship_mode   ,call_center   ,date_dim where d_month_seq between 1189 and 1189 + 23 and cs_ship_date_sk   = d_date_sk and cs_warehouse_sk   = w_warehouse_sk and cs_ship_mode_sk   = sm_ship_mode_sk and cs_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk and cs_list_price between 94 and 123 and sm_type = 'REGULAR' and cc_class = 'medium' and w_gmt_offset = -5 group by    substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name order by substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)         ,sm_type         ,cc_name limit 100;
rewritten_query: SELECT      SUBSTRING(w_warehouse_name, 1, 20) AS warehouse_short,     sm_type,     cc_name,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 30 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 31-60 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 61-90 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) BETWEEN 91 AND 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 91-120 days,     SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS >120 days FROM catalog_sales JOIN warehouse      ON catalog_sales.cs_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk     AND warehouse.w_gmt_offset = -5 JOIN ship_mode      ON catalog_sales.cs_ship_mode_sk = ship_mode.sm_ship_mode_sk     AND ship_mode.sm_type = 'REGULAR' JOIN call_center      ON catalog_sales.cs_call_center_sk = call_center.cc_call_center_sk     AND call_center.cc_class = 'medium' JOIN date_dim      ON catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk     AND date_dim.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1189 AND 1189 + 23 WHERE catalog_sales.cs_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123 GROUP BY      SUBSTRING(w_warehouse_name, 1, 20),     sm_type,     cc_name ORDER BY      warehouse_short,     sm_type,     cc_name LIMIT 100;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_ship_mode AS (     SELECT sm_ship_mode_sk, sm_type     FROM ship_mode     WHERE sm_type = 'TWO DAY' ), filtered_call_center AS (     SELECT cc_call_center_sk, cc_name     FROM call_center     WHERE cc_class = 'small' ), filtered_warehouse AS (     SELECT w_warehouse_sk, w_warehouse_name     FROM warehouse     WHERE w_gmt_offset = -5 ), filtered_date_dim AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1193 AND 1216 ) SELECT MIN(w.w_warehouse_name),        MIN(sm.sm_type),        MIN(cc.cc_name),        MIN(cs.cs_order_number),        MIN(cs.cs_item_sk) FROM catalog_sales cs JOIN filtered_warehouse w ON cs.cs_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk JOIN filtered_ship_mode sm ON cs.cs_ship_mode_sk = sm.sm_ship_mode_sk JOIN filtered_call_center cc ON cs.cs_call_center_sk = cc.cc_call_center_sk JOIN filtered_date_dim d ON cs.cs_ship_date_sk = d.d_date_sk WHERE cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 77 AND 106;

rewritten_query: WITH filtered_items1 AS (     SELECT i_item_sk     FROM item     WHERE i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Music') ), filtered_items2 AS (     SELECT i_item_sk     FROM item     WHERE i_manager_id BETWEEN 77 AND 96 ), filtered_sales AS (     SELECT ss_item_sk, ss_ticket_number, ss_customer_sk, ss_sold_date_sk     FROM store_sales     WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 236 AND 250 ), filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 1999 ), filtered_demographics AS (     SELECT cd_demo_sk     FROM customer_demographics     WHERE cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = 'Primary' ) SELECT      MIN(item1.i_item_sk),     MIN(item2.i_item_sk),     MIN(s1.ss_ticket_number),     MIN(s1.ss_item_sk) FROM      item AS item1 JOIN filtered_items1 fi1 ON item1.i_item_sk = fi1.i_item_sk JOIN filtered_sales s1 ON s1.ss_item_sk = item1.i_item_sk JOIN filtered_dates fd ON fd.d_date_sk = s1.ss_sold_date_sk JOIN customer c ON s1.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk JOIN filtered_demographics fd_demo ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = fd_demo.cd_demo_sk JOIN filtered_sales s2 ON s1.ss_ticket_number = s2.ss_ticket_number JOIN item AS item2 ON s2.ss_item_sk = item2.i_item_sk JOIN filtered_items2 fi2 ON item2.i_item_sk = fi2.i_item_sk WHERE      item1.i_item_sk < item2.i_item_sk;

rewritten_query: WITH s1_filtered AS (     SELECT s1.ss_ticket_number, s1.ss_item_sk, s1.ss_customer_sk     FROM store_sales s1     JOIN item AS item1 ON s1.ss_item_sk = item1.i_item_sk     JOIN date_dim ON s1.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk     JOIN customer ON s1.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk     JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk     JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk     WHERE s1.ss_list_price BETWEEN 182 AND 196       AND item1.i_category IN ('Children', 'Women')       AND date_dim.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 1999       AND cd_marital_status = 'D'       AND cd_education_status = 'College' ), s2_filtered AS (     SELECT ss_ticket_number, ss_item_sk     FROM store_sales s2     JOIN item AS item2 ON s2.ss_item_sk = item2.i_item_sk     WHERE s2.ss_list_price BETWEEN 182 AND 196       AND item2.i_manager_id BETWEEN 2 AND 21 ) SELECT      MIN(s1.ss_item_sk) AS min_item1_sk,     MIN(s2.ss_item_sk) AS min_item2_sk,     MIN(s1.ss_ticket_number) AS min_ticket_number,     MIN(s1.ss_item_sk) AS min_s1_item_sk FROM s1_filtered s1 JOIN s2_filtered s2 ON s1.ss_ticket_number = s2.ss_ticket_number WHERE s1.ss_item_sk < s2.ss_item_sk;

original_query: select  c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name, count(*) as cnt FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01 GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name ORDER BY cnt ;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk, d_date     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 1999 ), filtered_items AS (     SELECT i_item_sk     FROM item     WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') ), filtered_demographics AS (     SELECT hd_demo_sk     FROM household_demographics     WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20     AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' ), filtered_addresses AS (     SELECT ca_address_sk     FROM customer_address     WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') ) SELECT      c.c_customer_sk,     c.c_first_name,     c.c_last_name,     COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM filtered_dates d1 JOIN store_returns sr ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk JOIN store_sales ss ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk JOIN filtered_items fi ON ss.ss_item_sk = fi.i_item_sk JOIN web_sales ws ON sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk AND ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY) JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN filtered_addresses fa ON c.c_current_addr_sk = fa.ca_address_sk JOIN filtered_demographics fd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = fd.hd_demo_sk WHERE ss.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.8 * ss.ss_list_price AND 1.0 * ss.ss_list_price GROUP BY      c.c_customer_sk,     c.c_first_name,     c.c_last_name ORDER BY      cnt;

original_query: select  c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name, count(*) as cnt FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 57 * 0.01 AND 77 * 0.01 GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name ORDER BY cnt ;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_items AS (     SELECT i_item_sk     FROM item     WHERE i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music') ), filtered_addresses AS (     SELECT ca_address_sk     FROM customer_address     WHERE ca_state IN ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN') ), filtered_households AS (     SELECT hd_demo_sk     FROM household_demographics     WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20     AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' ), d1_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, (d_date + INTERVAL '90 days') AS end_date     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 1999 ), d2_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk, d_date     FROM date_dim     WHERE (d_year = 1999 OR d_year = 2000)     AND d_date <= '2000-03-31'::date ) SELECT      c.c_customer_sk,      c.c_first_name,      c.c_last_name,      COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customer c JOIN filtered_addresses fa ON c.c_current_addr_sk = fa.ca_address_sk JOIN filtered_households fh ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = fh.hd_demo_sk JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk JOIN filtered_items fi ON ss.ss_item_sk = fi.i_item_sk JOIN store_returns sr ON ss.ss_ticket_number = sr.sr_ticket_number                        AND ss.ss_item_sk = sr.sr_item_sk JOIN d1_dates d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk JOIN web_sales ws ON sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk                    AND ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk JOIN d2_dates d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk                  AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date WHERE (ss.ss_sales_price / ss.ss_list_price) BETWEEN 0.57 AND 0.77 GROUP BY      c.c_customer_sk,      c.c_first_name,      c.c_last_name ORDER BY      cnt;

original_query: select  c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name, count(*) as cnt FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Music', 'Sports') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('IA', 'KS', 'MD', 'MO', 'OK') AND d1.d_year = 2000 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '0-500' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 38 * 0.01 AND 58 * 0.01 GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_first_name, c_last_name ORDER BY cnt ;
rewritten_query: WITH filtered_dates AS (     SELECT d_date_sk, d_date     FROM date_dim     WHERE d_year = 2000 ), filtered_items AS (     SELECT i_item_sk     FROM item     WHERE i_category IN ('Jewelry', 'Music', 'Sports') ) SELECT      c.c_customer_sk,      c.c_first_name,      c.c_last_name,      COUNT(*) AS cnt  FROM      store_returns sr JOIN filtered_dates d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk JOIN filtered_items i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk AND ca.ca_state IN ('IA', 'KS', 'MD', 'MO', 'OK') JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk      AND hd.hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20     AND hd.hd_buy_potential = '0-500' JOIN web_sales ws ON sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk AND ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY) WHERE      (ss.ss_sales_price / ss.ss_list_price) BETWEEN 0.38 AND 0.58 GROUP BY      c.c_customer_sk,      c.c_first_name,      c.c_last_name  ORDER BY      cnt;
